text: What is something God has done in your life that you didn't deserve?
How has your faith helped you through a difficult moment recently?
What scripture or truth has been meaningful to you this week?
When did you feel closest to God recently?
What spiritual growth have you noticed in yourself?
What is something a family member did recently that made you smile?
What is a quality in your spouse/partner you're thankful for?
What is a childhood memory that still brings you joy?
How has your family supported your recovery?
What is something your children (or a child in your life) taught you?
Who showed you kindness recently, and how did it make you feel?
Who is someone you're glad is in your life, and why?
What is a conversation you had recently that meant something to you?
How has your sponsor or accountability partner helped you grow?
What friend have you been able to count on?
What is one thing about your body or health you're grateful for?
How has your physical health improved since starting recovery?
What healthy habit are you proud of maintaining?
What is a meal or food you enjoyed recently?
How did your body serve you well today?
What is something about your recovery journey you're thankful for right now?
What tool or practice has been most helpful in your recovery this week?
What is a temptation you resisted recently, and how did that feel?
What is a mistake or struggle that taught you something valuable?
How have you grown since your lowest point?
What is one way you've grown in the last 30 days?
What is something you accomplished at work that you're proud of?
Who at work has been supportive or encouraging?
What skill or ability do you have that you're thankful for?
What opportunity has come your way recently?
What is something beautiful you noticed today?
When did nature bring you peace or joy recently?
What season or weather are you enjoying right now?
What sound, sight, or smell brought you comfort today?
What is one thing about today that surprised you in a good way?
What is a simple pleasure you experienced today?
What made you laugh recently?
What small comfort did you enjoy today?
What is a routine moment that you usually take for granted but are thankful for?
What is a hard thing you did recently that you're proud of?
What is a fear you've faced or are facing with courage?
How are you different today than you were a year ago?
What boundary have you set that's protecting your recovery?
What is something you can do now that you couldn't do 6 months ago?
If you could only keep three things in your life, what would they be?
What is something you have that many people wish for?
What is a lesson you learned the hard way that you're now grateful for?
What made today worth living?
What are you looking forward to?
What would you miss most if it were gone tomorrow?
What prayer has God answered recently, even in an unexpected way?
What is a tradition or gathering with loved ones you cherish?
Who in your recovery community has inspired you lately?
What is one way your mental health has improved recently?
What is a project or task at work that energizes you?
What place in nature feels like a sanctuary to you?
